testCases.title: Card Number Iframe - Cross-origin isolation
testCases.notes: Iframe from testflex.cybersource.com, contentDocument returns null, cross-origin access throws Permission denied

testCases.title: CVV Iframe - Cross-origin isolation
testCases.notes: CVV in separate iframe, securityCode type, maxLength 4, cross-origin fully blocked

testCases.title: No Card Data in Network Requests
testCases.notes: 179 requests inspected, 0 contain card number or CVV. Tokenization via testflex.cybersource.com/flex/v2/tokens

testCases.title: No Card Data in Browser Storage
testCases.notes: localStorage (23 keys), sessionStorage (4 keys), cookies (6) - none contain card data

testCases.title: HTTPS Only - No Mixed Content
testCases.notes: 176 resources loaded, 0 non-HTTPS. All 12 domains serve over HTTPS exclusively

testCases.title: JWT Token Auth - Dynamic Per Session
testCases.notes: RS256 JWT, 15-min expiry, JTI and MicroformId change per session, origin-restricted to storefront domain
